text.text:
*Executive Summary*
Overnight risk remains centered on browser exploitation, cloud identity pressure, and vendor/service reliability that could affect MSP client operations.

fields.text:
*Security*
• Chrome zero-day patching remains high priority
• Credential theft and phishing pressure remain elevated

*Tech / Vendor*
• M365 / identity changes deserve review
• Vendor reliability and outage posture remain key watch items

text.text:
*MSP Impact*
MSPs should prioritize browser patching, identity monitoring, and vendor dependency awareness across client environments.

*Recommended Actions*
• Confirm browser patch compliance
• Review high-risk identity and endpoint alerts
• Watch major vendor status pages for disruption
